stemHtml:
A Brazilian-registered aircraft with a maximum mass of 230 tonnes vanished on 1 June 2009 over the mid-Atlantic, outside the territory of the State of design, manufacture, or the operator. It had departed from Paris Charles de Gaulle (France) bound for Rio de Janeiro Galeão (Brazil). The last radio contact was with a Brazilian ACC.
Per ICAO Annex 13 on Aircraft Accident and Incident Investigation, which State or organisation was responsible for conducting the technical investigation?

options.d: The State nearest to the accident site.
